title: [TASK] Initialize Turborepo monorepo structure with workspace configuration

conversation_log.summary: Task blocked pending architectural documentation. architecture.md was template-only. Created architectural task #16 to populate it with tech stack, folder structure, naming conventions, and key patterns before this implementation task can proceed.

Re-reviewed after Task #16 completion. architecture.md is now fully populated. Task #9 aligns with all architectural constraints. Notes: (1) turbo.json should include a `typecheck` pipeline task per Key Pattern #4; (2) packages/tsconfig/base.json must include `strict: true`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true`, `exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true` per Key Pattern #1 and ADR-003; (3) workspace tsconfig.json files must extend from @cv-tool/tsconfig and must not weaken strict settings.
